purpose: Controls pneumatic air flow for compressor load/unload operations through electrically actuated valve

states.name: valve_health
states.description: Overall health of solenoid valve affecting flow capacity

states.name: valve_position
states.description: Current valve position from 0 (closed) to 1 (fully open)

events.name: solenoid_valve_malfunction
events.description: Solenoid valve out of order preventing compressor loading or unloading

parameters.name: valve_usage_factor
parameters.description: Usage factor affecting valve degradation rate

parameters.name: valve_response_coefficient
parameters.description: First-order lag coefficient for valve position tracking

parameters.name: max_output_pressure
parameters.description: Maximum output pressure when valve is fully open

parameters.name: valve_health_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Valve health threshold below which malfunction occurs

state_transition_logic: valve_health decreases by (1.0 / valve_degradation_timescale) * valve_usage_factor * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]

valve_position approaches target_position using first-order lag with coefficient min(valve_response_coefficient, 0.5), where target_position is 1.0 if control_pressure > control_pressure_threshold else 0.0, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
assumptions: Valve degradation is primarily driven by usage cycles
Control pressure threshold determines valve activation
Valve health directly affects flow capacity
Pneumatic control signal equals control air pressure output
